content.speakerText: How loud are Cavalier King Charles dogs? I'm in an apartment.
content.speakerTextCn: 卡瓦利尔犬叫得大声吗？我住公寓。

options.text: They bark all day long and are very aggressive.
Not really—they're quiet and chill. Perfect for condos!
They only bark when they see strangers.
They are known for howling at night.

content.explanation: 正确答案准确反映了卡瓦利尔犬安静、适合公寓的特点。干扰项夸大了吠叫行为或添加了不相关特征（如攻击性、夜间嚎叫），不符合该品种的实际性格。

content.speakerText: Do they need a lot of exercise?

options.text: They need to run for two hours every day.
A short walk and some playtime daily’s enough.
They should be taken to the gym three times a week.
They get all their exercise by chasing squirrels.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了真实口语表达，符合该犬种低运动需求的特点。干扰项夸大了运动量或使用了不自然的表达（如‘go to the gym’），不符合宠物品种的实际需求。

content.speakerText: Are Cavalier King Charles dogs good with children?
content.speakerTextCn: 卡瓦利尔犬对孩子友好吗？

options.text: They're very protective and don't like loud kids.
They're sweet, patient, and love being around kids.
They prefer to be alone and avoid human contact.
They're too energetic and might knock over small children.

content.explanation: 正确答案准确描述了该品种温顺、耐心、喜爱儿童的典型性格。干扰项要么错误地描述为攻击性，要么夸大其能量水平，与该犬种作为伴侣犬的特性不符。

content.template: They're quiet and chill. Perfect for ___!
content.hint: 用于描述适合居住环境的词，常与公寓住户相关
content.knowledgePoint: 场景高频词汇（居住环境表达）

content.template: A short walk and some playtime ___ is enough.
content.hint: 描述日常习惯的频率词，用于表达宠物的运动需求
content.knowledgePoint: 频率副词搭配（日常需求表达）

content.template: They're ___ potatoes—they love lounging on the couch.
content.hint: 一个地道的口语表达，形容宠物不爱动、喜欢躺着

content.speakerText: How loud are Cavalier King Charles dogs? I'm in an apartment.
content.speakerTextCn: 卡瓦利尔犬叫得大声吗？我住公寓。
expectedAnswers: They bark occasionally, but it's very soft and rare.
Perfect for apartments; they hardly ever bark.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确回应了公寓住户对噪音的担忧
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确，是否避免了夸张描述
表达自然度：是否使用了口语化表达（如 chill, hardly ever）
关键词覆盖：是否包含 quiet, apartment, bark 等核心词

content.speakerText: Do they need a lot of exercise?
expectedAnswers: Nah, they’re couch potatoes—just a short walk and some cuddles.
Minimal exercise needed; they’re happy with indoor play.
Daily 15-minute walks and a game of fetch are plenty.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否准确传达了低运动需求的特性
语言准确性：是否正确使用了动词搭配（need, take, get）
表达自然度：是否使用了地道口语（如 nah, couch potatoes）
关键词覆盖：是否包含 exercise, walk, play, minimal 等关键词

content.speakerText: Are Cavalier King Charles dogs good for first-time pet owners?
content.speakerTextCn: 卡瓦利尔犬适合新手养宠人士吗？
expectedAnswers: Yes, they're easygoing and affectionate—perfect for beginners.
Absolutely! They’re not high-maintenance and bond closely with people.
Great choice—they adapt well to new owners and love attention.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确回答了是否适合新手的问题
语言准确性：是否使用了正确的形容词和动词结构
表达自然度：是否使用了口语化、鼓励性表达（如 perfect, absolutely, great choice）
关键词覆盖：是否包含 beginner, easygoing, affectionate, low-maintenance 等关键词
